findings.description: Section s3 has hints ['稼動確認済み環境', 'テスト済み'] but its content is 'なし'. Having hints on an empty section may cause query routing to return 'なし' for questions about confirmed environments, even though the actual content is in s4.
findings.source_evidence: The source h2 'Nablarchフレームワークの稼動確認済み環境' with its introductory sentence and subsections maps to s4. Section s3 appears to be a structural artifact with no corresponding source content, yet carries hints that overlap with s4's topic.
